evals.name: list-and-cat-with-connection-check
evals.prompt: I just set up Draft on my machine. Can you list all my pages and show me the contents of the most recent one in markdown format?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs draft status, then draft start-server if needed, then draft status again, then draft ls, identifies a page, then draft cat <id> --format markdown
expectations: Agent starts by running draft status
Agent runs draft start-server if draft status indicates the server is not running or the browser is not connected
Agent lists pages with draft ls
Agent reads a specific page with draft cat <id>

evals.name: create-and-append-with-connection-check
evals.prompt: Create a new Draft page called 'Sprint 42 Retro' and add three bullet points: what went well, what didn't, and action items. Make sure you check if you are connected first.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs draft status first, then draft create, then draft append with markdown bullet list via stdin
expectations: Agent starts by running draft status
Agent creates page with draft create 'Sprint 42 Retro'
Agent appends content using draft append <id> via stdin

evals.name: replace-section-on-recent-page
evals.prompt: In my most recent Draft page, replace the Status section with 'Status: Complete - shipped to staging on March 12th'. Check connection first and make sure you're on staging (https://markdown-editor-staging.web.app/).
evals.expected_output: Agent runs draft status, then draft start-server https://markdown-editor-staging.web.app/ if needed, then draft status again, then draft ls to find the most recent ID, then draft replace <id> --heading 'Status'
expectations: Agent starts by running draft status
Agent lists pages to find the correct ID
Agent uses draft replace command on the correct ID

evals.name: create-and-publish-roadmap
evals.prompt: I want to share my project roadmap. Create a new Draft page titled 'Project Roadmap', and then publish it to the web. Remember to check your connection first.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs draft status, then draft create 'Project Roadmap', captures the generated ID, and runs GLOBAL_PUBLISH_PASSWORD=innosage draft publish <id>
expectations: Agent starts by running draft status
Agent creates the page and captures the ID
Agent uses the GLOBAL_PUBLISH_PASSWORD=innosage draft publish <id> command with the correct ID
